---
title: "Stan fitting"
author: "Emma Rose Hahn"
date: "2026-05-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, # Data manipulation and plotting
  dplyr,
  here,         # Robust file paths
  cmdstanr, # Stan interface
  ggplot2,     
  posterior,    # Posterior analysis
  bayesplot,
  hrbrthemes, # Plotting MCMC
  plan,
  future, #for the plan function
  furrr
)
```



```{r}
# Define prior parameters
#LOG_C_PRIOR_MEAN <- log(2)
#LOG_C_PRIOR_SD <- 1

# Select one simulated agent with specific parameters
agent_to_fit <- simulated_responses |>
  filter(
    round(w1_true, 1) == 0.9,
    abs(log_c_true - log(2.0)) == min(abs(log_c_true - log(2.0)))
  ) |>
  filter(agent_id == min(agent_id)) |>
  slice(1:total_trials)

stopifnot(nrow(agent_to_fit) == total_trials)

# Prepare data with all 5 alien features
gcm_data_single <- list(
  N_total           = nrow(agent_to_fit),
  N_features        = 5L,  # 5 alien features
  y                 = as.integer(agent_to_fit$sim_response),
  obs               = as.matrix(agent_to_fit[, c("eye_stalks", "colour_green", "slim_legs", "arms_up", "spots")]),
  cat_feedback      = as.integer(agent_to_fit$category_feedback),
  prior_w_alpha     = c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1),  # Uniform prior on 5 features
  prior_log_c_mu    = LOG_C_PRIOR_MEAN,
  prior_log_c_sigma = LOG_C_PRIOR_SD,
  prior_bias_alpha  = 1,
  prior_bias_beta   = 1,
  run_diagnostics   = 1L
)

dir.create(here("simmodels"), showWarnings = FALSE)
fit_filepath_single <- here("simmodels", "stALIEN_fit.rds")

if (regenerate_simulations || !file.exists(fit_filepath_single)) {
  pf_single <- tryCatch(
    mod_gcm_single$pathfinder(
      data      = gcm_data_single,
      seed      = 123,
      num_paths = 4,
      refresh   = 0
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      message("Pathfinder failed — falling back to default initialisation.")
      NULL
    }
  )
  
  fit_gcm_single <- mod_gcm_single$sample(
    data            = gcm_data_single,
    init            = pf_single,
    seed            = 123,
    chains          = 4,
    parallel_chains = min(4, availableCores()),
    iter_warmup     = 1000,
    iter_sampling   = 1500,
    refresh         = 300,
    adapt_delta     = 0.9
  )
  fit_gcm_single$save_object(fit_filepath_single)
  cat("Single-agent model fitted and saved.\n")
} else {
  fit_gcm_single <- readRDS(fit_filepath_single)
  cat("Loaded existing single-agent fit.\n")
}
```

```{r}
diagnostic_summary_table <- function(fit, params) {
  summary_tbl <- fit$summary(params)
  
  # Check diagnostics
  summary_tbl <- summary_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      rhat_pass = rhat < 1.01 | is.na(rhat),
      ess_pass = ess_tail > 400 | is.na(ess_tail),
      pass = rhat_pass & ess_pass
    ) %>%
    select(variable, mean, sd, rhat, ess_bulk, ess_tail, pass)
  
  return(as.data.frame(summary_tbl))  # ← Convert to data.frame
}
```



```{r}

if (!is.null(fit_gcm_single)) {
  diag_tbl <- diagnostic_summary_table(
    fit_gcm_single,
    params = c("w[1]", "w[2]", "log_c", "c", "bias")
  )
  print(diag_tbl)

  if (!all(diag_tbl$pass)) {
    warning("Diagnostic battery has failures — interpret posteriors with caution.")
  }

  bayesplot::mcmc_trace(
    fit_gcm_single$draws(c("log_c", "w[1]", "bias")),
    facet_args = list(ncol = 1)
  )

  bayesplot::mcmc_rank_overlay(
    fit_gcm_single$draws(c("log_c", "w[1]", "bias"))
  )
}
```
